title: Blog API with CRUD, Auth, and Pagination
spec: Build a REST API for managing blog posts. Endpoints: GET /posts (with pagination), POST /posts, GET /posts/:id, PUT /posts/:id, DELETE /posts/:id. Include JWT authentication middleware and rate limiting.

title: Dashboard Charts Component
spec: Create a reusable charts component for the dashboard using D3.js. Support bar charts, line charts, and pie charts. Data should be fetched from the /api/metrics endpoint.

title: Rate Limiting Middleware
spec: Add rate limiting middleware to the blog API. Use a sliding window algorithm with configurable limits per endpoint. Store counters in Redis.

title: Shared Utility Library Setup
spec: Initialize a shared TypeScript utility library with date formatting, string helpers, and validation functions. Set up vitest, publish config, and documentation.

title: WebSocket Event Logging
spec: Add structured logging for all WebSocket events. Log op receipts, event emissions, connection lifecycle, and errors. Use tracing crate with JSON output format.
